productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Vapor Wove Black Track Pants
description: CompositionBlack tracks made of 100% polyester with mesh inserts made of 95% polyester and 5% spandex, made with DRI Fit technology, with an elasticated drawstring waist that has an elastic band on the back with the brand name, insert pockets on the sides with zippered closures, embroidered swoosh logo on the left leg and zippered slits on the leg hem FittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold Wash with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron Do not dry clean Stylish to the T, these black track pants from nike with DRI Fit technology are designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband gives a snug fit. Team it with Sports tees and performance shoes for workouts and training sessions.
